content.text: You are a quantum mechanics analysis assistant. Given an image of a probability density function |ψ(x)|² plot for a solution to the time-independent Schrödinger equation, extract and return the physical parameters as a JSON object. Always respond with valid JSON only — no explanation, no markdown fences.

Analyse this |ψ(x)|² probability density function plot and return the Schrödinger equation parameters as JSON with these exact keys:
  potential_type   (string: infinite_square_well | harmonic_oscillator | finite_square_well | hydrogen_radial | double_well)
  quantum_number_n (integer)
  mass_au          (float, in atomic units)
  energy_au        (float, in atomic units)
  potential_params (object with potential-specific keys)

Respond with JSON only.
{"potential_type": "infinite_square_well", "quantum_number_n": 4, "mass_au": 1.0, "energy_au": 78.956835, "potential_params": {"L": 1.0}}
